description: Onboarding stage 03 (empathy + micro-kb). Advisor opens with empathy for the working parent's load and shares one age-appropriate micro tip with a one-sentence rationale. No lecture, no embedded promo. Emotional_support dominant, acquaintance_building tolerable.

turns.user_input: 嗯，我知道户外活动有用，但是我们没什么时间。
